texto: The most sublime labour of poetry is to give sense and passion to insensate things
autor: and it is characteristic of children to take inanimate things in their hands and talk to them in play as if they were living persons... This philological-philosophical axiom proves to us that in the world's childhood men were by nature sublime poets...
explicacao: Citação de and it is characteristic of children to take inanimate things in their hands and talk to them in play as if they were living persons... This philological-philosophical axiom proves to us that in the world's childhood men were by nature sublime poets... sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The most sublime labour of poetry is to give sense and passion to insensate things” articula reflexao, giambattista-vico, new-science em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como new-science.
